testcase.name: test_user_me_endpoint
testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_pre_deploy_comprehensive.py:50: in test_user_me_endpoint assert response.status_code == 200, f"Get user info failed: {response.text}" E AssertionError: Get user info failed: {"detail":"Not Found"} E assert 404 == 200 E + where 404 = <Response [404]>.status_code

testcase.name: test_admin_stats
testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_pre_deploy_comprehensive.py:168: in test_admin_stats assert response.status_code == 200, f"Get admin stats failed: {response.text}" E AssertionError: Get admin stats failed: {"detail":"Not Found"} E assert 404 == 200 E + where 404 = <Response [404]>.status_code

testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_pre_deploy_comprehensive.py:226: in test_admin_kyc_queue assert response.status_code == 200, f"Get KYC queue failed: {response.text}" E AssertionError: Get KYC queue failed: {"detail":"Not Found"} E assert 404 == 200 E + where 404 = <Response [404]>.status_code
